examples: Utter the word "calm" in your mind with every exhalation.
He yawned in reverse: first an exhalation, then an inhalation.
With an exhalation, bring your feet up, keeping your knees bent near your chest.
Her answer was so hushed that it seemed barely more than an exhalation of air.
Here's what chemistry students know: For some reason, Caesar's dying breath, his last exhalation, has become a classic teaching tool in high school and college.
